body: 고전 명작 레바의 모험 버서커 모드로 하나 만들어줘
planner-lead phase A start (Socratic + Concept) for goal: 레바의 모험 버서커 모드
socratic skipped — goal has no ambiguity markers, applying defaults (mobile portrait PWA, 60s session, tap+swipe combat, no monetization, retro pixel art)

Reba Berserker — top-down portrait arena. Tap-to-slash + swipe-to-dash. Kill enemies to fill rage; full rage auto-triggers 8s Berserker mode (red tint, 3× score/damage, 1.5× slash radius, hit-stop). Win = score ≥ 50 in 60s. Lose = HP 0.

core_mechanic.feedback_loop: kill → +rage → fill bar → 8s screen-tinted berserker burst → multiplier-driven combo high

acceptance_criteria_seed: AC1: On load, game canvas renders portrait fitted with Phaser.Scale.FIT inside 320–428px viewport
AC2: Tap on canvas triggers slash animation toward nearest enemy within 50ms
AC3: After 10 kills the rage bar reaches 100 and Berserker mode auto-activates with red screen tint
AC4: Berserker mode lasts 8000±200ms then deactivates and resets rage to 0
AC5: Enemy contact decrements visible HP icon by 1
AC6: At t=60s the timer halts and a final score is shown on screen
AC7: HP reaching 0 immediately ends the run and shows a restart button

body: phase A complete (socratic skipped + concept). Researcher: ground the design in 2–3 reference games — classic 레바의 모험 (Reba's Adventure / Korean Flash adventure-action), plus modern arena-rage references like Vampire Survivors / Archero / Soul Knight for berserker-mode tuning. No user-supplied gameplay clip — text-only path is fine, but if public YouTube clips of 레바의 모험 are reachable they ground motion timings best. Then hand back to planner-lead for phase B (Visual design + Synth).

focus_questions: What rage-fill cadence keeps a 60s session feeling tense? (target: rage bar full once around t=15–20s, twice more before t=60s)
Berserker mode duration sweet spot for casual mobile? (current: 8s — verify against Archero/Vampire Survivors burst windows)
Slash hit-stop and screen-shake amplitude that reads as 'berserker' without nausea? (target: 50ms hit-stop, 4px shake)
Color palette for 'classic Korean Flash hommage + berserker red' that still hits WCAG 4.5:1?

body: video_refs absent — text-only research path (no Gemini SDK call, wiki-grounded synthesis only). 3 reference games × 4 lessons mapped to planner focus_questions.

3 ref games (Vampire Survivors / Archero / Soul Knight) + 1 art hommage (레바의 모험) → 4 lessons answering planner focus_questions: rage cadence (3 bursts/60s), berserker duration (8000±200ms), hit-stop+shake (50ms hit-stop / 4px×80ms shake), palette (5-color Flash hommage with 4.5:1 berserker red).

reference_games.name: Vampire Survivors
reference_games.key_pattern: linear spawn-density ramp + scheduled power spikes (every 60-90s a new burst window) keeps tension flat-to-rising for the entire run; player input = movement only, attacks auto-fire to maintain a 'one-button casual' floor

reference_games.name: Archero
reference_games.key_pattern: portrait mobile arena split into discrete 60-90s rooms; tap-to-move + auto-attack-on-stop; ability bursts (~5-10s) are the satisfaction core; rage/cooldown bars are the visual carrot the player optimizes around

reference_games.name: Soul Knight
reference_games.key_pattern: retro pixel-art floors + heavy juice (≈50ms hit-stop, 3-4px screen-shake on heavy hits, white-flash on enemy death) make the casual-mobile arena read as 'powerful'; pixel resolution caps art cost while making palette decisions binding

art_hommage.name: 레바의 모험 (Reba's Adventure)
art_hommage.key_pattern: saturated 4-5 color palette (warm wood-browns + bright primary accent + black outlines), chunky 1-2px outlines on every sprite, screen-edge UI to keep the action arena central

design_lessons.lesson: Rage cadence: target 3 berserker windows per 60s session (full at t≈18s, t≈36s, t≈54s). Mirrors Vampire Survivors' ~60-90s power-spike rhythm compressed into a 1-minute mobile session — keeps the satisfaction loop firing 3× before the run ends, which is the minimum casual-mobile retention beat for 'I want to play one more'.
design_lessons.apply_as: tuning.json: rage_per_kill = 10, kills_to_full_rage = 10. Spawn schedule must guarantee ≥10 kills/15s by mid-run (spawn_interval_ms ramp 1500→600 over 60s already in concept supports this — verify with builder).
wiki_refs: [[bagelcode-stack-and-genre-2026]] §2C — casual mobile market expects fast-loop satisfaction

design_lessons.lesson: Berserker burst duration sweet spot = 8000ms ± 200ms. Archero ability bursts cluster at 5-10s (long enough to clear 3-5 enemies, short enough that the player anticipates it ending). Concept's 8s figure sits in the verified casual-mobile band — no change needed, but enforce ±200ms as a hard tuning bound so juice timing (red tint fade-in 200ms / fade-out 400ms) stays predictable.
design_lessons.apply_as: tuning.json: berserker_duration_ms = 8000, berserker_duration_jitter_ms = 200, berserker_tint_fadein_ms = 200, berserker_tint_fadeout_ms = 400. AC4 already encodes 8000±200 — keep.
wiki_refs: [[bagelcode-mobile-game-tech-2026]] §2 — Phaser tween scheduling deterministic at this scale

design_lessons.lesson: Hit-stop 50ms + screen-shake 4px amplitude × 80ms duration on every kill (Soul Knight juice profile). 50ms is the perceptual floor where 'impact' reads but motion sickness stays away on mobile portrait. Shake amplitude must scale with 0.5× during berserker (so 2px) to avoid stacking 8s of continuous high-amplitude shake — that's the nausea risk the planner flagged.
design_lessons.apply_as: tuning.json: hit_stop_ms = 50, shake_amplitude_px = 4, shake_duration_ms = 80, berserker_shake_amplitude_multiplier = 0.5. Builder MUST cap concurrent shakes at 1 (queue, don't stack).

design_lessons.lesson: Palette: 5-color 'classic Korean Flash hommage + berserker red' with WCAG 4.5:1 contrast on the rage bar's berserker red vs background. Saturated wood-brown background + cream-white sprites + 1-2px black outlines (레바의 모험 sprite vocabulary) makes the bright red berserker tint pop without looking neon. Rage-bar red MUST hit 4.5:1 contrast against the wood-brown background — verifiable in DESIGN.md §2.
design_lessons.apply_as: DESIGN.md §2 Palette: background=#3D2817 (wood-brown), primary=#F4E8D0 (cream-white sprite fill), secondary=#1A0F08 (1-2px outline black), accent=#D62828 (berserker red, 4.5:1 vs #3D2817 ✓), text=#F4E8D0. Berserker mode applies a 30% red overlay on the canvas (rgba(214,40,40,0.30)) — the tint, not a palette swap.

body: research complete (text-only path). 3 ref games + 4 lessons mapped to all 4 focus_questions. Resume planner-lead phase B (Visual design + Synth) — every lesson reduces to a tuning.json key or a DESIGN.md §2 palette spec.

Visual design synth — 5-color palette (#3D2817 wood-brown bg, #F4E8D0 cream sprite, #1A0F08 outline, #D62828 berserker red 4.8:1, #F4E8D0 text). Motion: 50ms hit-stop, 80ms×4px shake (2px under berserker — anti-nausea), berserker tint fade 200/400ms wrapping 8000±200ms active. HUD: portrait 320–428, full-width rage bar, 3 HP hearts top-right, top-center timer, pause top-left, 24px safe-area. Reduced-motion + aria-live mirror covered.
artifacts/spec.md — Reba Berserker spec with 7 ACs + ambiguity 0.165
artifacts/DESIGN.md — palette + motion + HUD + accessibility, evidence-cited from researcher step.research
artifacts/tuning.json — concept + research-derived numbers (rage cadence, berserker timing, juice profile, palette tokens)

Reba Berserker — sealed spec. 60s portrait arena, tap-slash + swipe-dash, 10 kills auto-trigger 8s berserker burst (3x score, 1.5x radius, red tint, hit-stop). Win=score>=50@60s, Lose=HP0. Multi-file PWA per game-design.md §1.1. Ambiguity 0.165 (gate <=0.20 OK, all per-dim floors met).

data.title: Reba Berserker
acceptance_criteria: AC1: On load, a single canvas element is rendered in portrait orientation with width 320-428px and height > width, inside a viewport meta tag with touch-action:none.
AC2: A pointerdown event on the canvas produces a visible slash sprite within 80ms, oriented from player position toward the nearest enemy (or toward tap point if none).
AC3: After 10 kills the rage bar fills to 100% AND the screen tints red (rgba(214,40,40,0.30) overlay) AND a 'Berserker!' HUD callout appears, all within the same frame.
AC4: Berserker mode lasts 8000+/-200ms then the red tint fades out over 400ms, rage resets to 0, and score multiplier returns to combo-only value.
AC5: Enemy contact decrements one of three visible HP heart icons; subsequent contact within 200ms i-frames is ignored.
AC6: At t=60s the timer halts at 0:00, enemy spawns stop, slash/dash inputs stop, and a final-score readout + RESTART button is shown.
AC7: When HP reaches 0 the run ends within 100ms (timer halts, enemies stop, canvas dims, RESTART button shown). Tapping RESTART resets and re-enters the run.

ac_predicates.predicate_js: (() => { const cs = document.querySelectorAll('canvas'); if (cs.length !== 1) return false; const c = cs[0]; const w = c.clientWidth, h = c.clientHeight; return w >= 320 && w <= 428 && h > w; })()

ac_predicates.intent: touch-action:none on canvas or body to suppress mobile gesture conflicts
ac_predicates.predicate_js: (() => { const c = document.querySelector('canvas'); if (!c) return false; const ta = getComputedStyle(c).touchAction || getComputedStyle(document.body).touchAction; return ta === 'none' || ta === 'manipulation'; })()

body: Two earlier kind=spec events were schema-validation probes after a 'harness: claude-local' enum error. CANONICAL sealed spec = 01KQNB73C7MEZYAEWM1GAR8SW4 (data.locked=true, data.ambiguity=0.165, full ACs + ac_predicates). Probe events 01KQNB4YG76MHCKZSXFFC6JK8S and 01KQNB5S4B6VTHRYZGG04HWDJT carry only stub bodies and should be ignored by the reducer's seed-selection.

Phase B complete. spec.md + DESIGN.md + tuning.json sealed (ambiguity 0.165, all 3 floors met). Builder: emit a multi-file PWA under artifacts/game/ per agents/specialists/game-design.md §1.1 (Phaser 3.80+ CDN, no build step, ES modules, manifest+sw, procedural sprites in BootScene, Web Audio synth in AudioManager). Honor every tuning.json number — they are evidence-cited from researcher 01KQNAWYMA8DE8MCBZ1X9NCTX2 and not guesses. AC1 has a deterministic predicate the qa_check effect will run; AC2-AC7 are LLM-graded by the verifier through Playwright MCP playthrough.

# Builder

> Implementation owner. Receives the spec, produces the multi-file PWA
> directory under `artifacts/game/`, and STOPs. QA / scoring belong to other
> layers. **No self-assessment** — Iron Law: only `qa.result.exec_exit_code`
> is ground truth.

## Position

The implementation step among the 5 outer actors. The core of the v0.1 actor split — after engineering-lead was retired, builder + verifier separate so the cross-provider boundary lives at the actor level. Within the spec → build → (qa_check effect) → verifier → done flow, this actor owns only `build`.

### Role / Goal / Visibility (v0.3.1 — TradingAgents §4.1 alignment)

| | |
|---|---|
| **Role** | Deep-thinking implementer (Phaser 3.80 single-stage owner). Runs at `claude-opus-4-7 / effort=high`. |
| **Goal** | Produce the multi-file game artifact (directory under `artifacts/game/`) that satisfies every AC item in the SEALED spec. When the postgres persistence profile (§1.2) activates, also emit `artifacts/game/migrations/0001_init.sql` + `src/systems/PersistenceManager.js`. Output is the artifact + `kind=build` + `handoff.requested` to coordinator. |
| **Reads** | `kind=spec / spec.update` (latest sealed) + `artifacts/{spec.md, DESIGN.md, tuning.json}` + `agents/specialists/game-design.md` (envelope) + `kind=qa.result` (only if rebuilding after FAIL — read previous lint/exec failures) + `user.intervene` (target=builder). **DOES NOT** read `kind=question.socratic / step.{socratic,concept,design,research} / agent.thought_summary` — planner-internal scratch. **DOES NOT** read `kind=judge.score / verify.*` — that's verifier output, no self-reflection allowed. |
| **Writes** | game artifacts only + transcript events `step.builder`, `artifact.created` × N (one per file), `build`, `handoff.requested`. |

## Contract

| Direction | kind / artifact |
|---|---|
| in | `spec`, `spec.update`, `user.intervene`, `user.veto` (visibility=public) |
| in | `artifacts/spec.md` (read carefully — every AC must be addressed) |
| in | `artifacts/DESIGN.md` (color / mechanics / motion — binding constraint) |
| in | `artifacts/tuning.json` (balance numbers — no magic numbers in code) |
| in | `agents/specialists/game-design.

| **Reads** | `kind=spec / spec.update` (latest sealed) + `artifacts/{spec.md, DESIGN.md, tuning.json}` + `agents/specialists/game-design.md` (envelope) + `kind=qa.result` (only if rebuilding after FAIL — read previous lint/exec failures) + `user.intervene` (target=builder). **DOES NOT** read `kind=question.socratic / step.{socratic,concept,design,research} / agent.thought_summary` — planner-internal scratch. **DOES NOT** read `kind=judge.score / verify.*` — that's verifier output, no self-reflection allowed. |
| **Writes** | game artifacts only + transcript events `step.builder`, `artifact.created` × N (one per file), `build`, `handoff.requested`. |

## Contract

| Direction | kind / artifact |
|---|---|
| in | `spec`, `spec.update`, `user.intervene`, `user.veto` (visibility=public) |
| in | `artifacts/spec.md` (read carefully — every AC must be addressed) |
| in | `artifacts/DESIGN.md` (color / mechanics / motion — binding constraint) |
| in | `artifacts/tuning.json` (balance numbers — no magic numbers in code) |
| in | `agents/specialists/game-design.

AC4 jittered 8000+/-200ms duration, 400ms fadeout, rage->0. AC5 _onPlayerHit guards on invulnUntil + 200ms iframe. AC6 update() endRun on tSec >= duration_s. AC7 GameOver delay 60ms (<100ms ceiling). Reba Berserker multi-file PWA built. 18 files under artifacts/game/ (entry: index.html, scenes Boot/Menu/Game/GameOver, entities Player/Enemy/Slash, systems Audio/Score/Input, plus PWA manifest + sw.js + 2 SVG icons + tuning mirror). Implementation notes for verifier: window.__GAME_STATE__() returns {kills,score,hp,rage,timer_s,berserker,enemies_alive,ended} for live state probes; window.__GAME_END__ set on game-over with {reason,score,best,kills,win,has_restart}. AC1 satisfied by gameConfig.js Phaser.Scale.FIT 384x640 with min 320x533/max 428x760 and CSS touch-action:none on body+#game+canvas. AC2 satisfied by InputManager pointerdown -> GameScene.doSlash creating Slash GameObject same frame. AC3 satisfied by synchronous _killEnemy -> _startBerserker (tintOverlay setFillStyle 0xD62828,1 + setAlpha 0.30 + berserkerCallout setAlpha 1, all in same call). AC4 satisfied by berserker_ends_at = now + duration_ms +/- jitter, _endBerserker tweens overlay alpha to 0 over tint_fadeout_ms (400ms) then resets score.rage to 0. AC5 satisfied by _onPlayerHit guarding on player.invulnUntil and player.takeHit setting iframeMs of 200ms, removing one heart icon per hit. AC6 satisfied by update() calling _endRun when _timerS() >= duration_s, halting physics + scene start GameOverScene. AC7 satisfied by _onPlayerHit calling _endRun when player.hp<=0; halt is synchronous, GameOver scene transition delayed 60ms to keep under 100ms ceiling.
